creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2008-09-02 20:27:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    emulators/desmume    Makefile distinfo 
  Added files:
    emulators/desmume    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.8. The latest version of the emulator includes several major feature additions, including support for 3D rendering and a gdb stub.
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:             126985
  Submitted by:   L Campbell <llc2w at virginia dot edu> (improved by me)
  Approved by:    Stefan Sperling <stsp at stsp dot in-berlin dot de> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.7       +17 -6     ports/emulators/desmume/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -3      ports/emulators/desmume/distinfo
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/emulators/desmume/pkg-plist (new)
